name: SURYA VAMSI MAKANA
summary:
Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience in healthcare, finance, and advertising. Skilled in application development, configuration,
technical and functional support, with expertise in Go, Java, Spring Boot, React.js, and PostgreSQL. Experienced in microservices, REST APIs,
Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD automation, debugging, and observability. Proficient in TypeScript and modern testing frameworks (Jest, Cypress),
with hands-on experience on Microsoft Dynamics Navision and Hyland OnBase. Contributor to open-source projects and collaborative
distributed codebases. Built real-time data pipelines and scalable backend systems deployed on AWS, Azure, and OpenShift.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Deployed HIPAA-compliant Go and Spring Boot microservices, optimizing the processing of 30K+ patient records monthly and supporting
integration with Microsoft Dynamics Navision.
Architected GraphQL, REST, and SOAP APIs with Redis caching, eliminating 12K+ duplicate claims, accelerating queries, and enabling
interoperability with Hyland OnBase.
Dockerized Go services and automated ECS pipelines with Jenkins, enabling 20+ yearly deployments with zero rollbacks.
Resolved CI/CD issues using Splunk and CloudWatch, reducing AWS deployment failures through root-cause analysis.
Enhanced system visibility with Splunk metrics and distributed tracing, identifying performance bottlenecks proactively.
Streamlined AWS Kinesis–DynamoDB pipelines using XML/XSLT and Spring Security, ensuring secure and scalable data flow.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected a Java Spring Boot backend on AWS EC2, scaling to 2M+ daily ad requests and blocking 4K+ fraudulent attempts.
Developed a React.js UI library with 25 modular components, accelerating brand builds by 3 days per sprint.
Improved front-end reliability with TypeScript, React Hooks, and Jest/Cypress, cutting regressions and boosting deployment confidence.
Built D3.js and HighCharts dashboards to visualize 10M+ records daily, accelerating campaign intelligence and decision-making.
Containerized microservices with Docker and Kubernetes, enabling 50+ zero-downtime CI/CD releases annually.

experience.title: Programmer Analyst
bullets: Delivered a Spring MVC & Hibernate loan-origination system on PostgreSQL, automate workflows to cut approval time by 1 day.
Developed a responsive Angular.js loan-tracking dashboard with sub-2s latency for 12K+ users, ensuring legacy system compatibility.
Architected scalable Kafka pipelines with partitioning and concurrency control, blocking 15K+ high-risk transactions quarterly.
Resolved backend failures using ELK Stack and Azure Monitor, preventing recurring outages through root-cause fixes.
Automated nightly reconciliations in Azure Data Factory/SQL Server, ensuring error-free PL/SQL transfers across 30+ branches.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Engineered a React.js scheduling UI with 18 reusable components, accelerating workflows across 2.1M enterprise records.
Enhanced TypeScript modules via strict linting and Jest, improving reliability & lowering pre-release bugs by 20%.
Devised FastAPI–Spring Boot microservices, streamlining verification flows and advancing LLM-driven anomaly detection.
Optimized PostgreSQL with partitioning and indexing, cutting query latency by 220 ms across 12 datasets.
Orchestrated containerized deployments on OpenShift using Docker and GitLab CI, launching 30+ stable releases quarterly with zero
rollbacks, supported by Grafana and Datadog observability dashboards.

education: AWS Certified AI Practitioner | Link | AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner | Link | Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate | Link
projects: AI-Powered Anomaly Detection & Insights Platform: Built a real-time fraud and anomaly detection pipeline with Kafka, Spark, and Python
(Isolation Forest, XGBoost) processing 5M+ daily records, and deployed Spring Boot/React on AWS EKS with CI/CD for scalable ML insights.
Reddit Chatbot: Architected a multi-domain Reddit text classifier with ChatterBot, BM25 (Solr), and Flask APIs triaging 8K+ queries across 10
topics, and scaled a React.js UI on GCP with async queues and caching for 1.5K+ concurrent users and real-time visual streams.
Cloud-Native E-Commerce Platform: Engineered a Spring Boot-React e-commerce app on AWS ECS with PostgreSQL and Docker handling 50K+
monthly transactions, integrating payment APIs and Redis caching with rate-limited, idempotent workflows to boost reliability and security.
Real-Time Data Streaming Pipeline: Orchestrated a Kafka–Spark streaming pipeline on AKS to ingest and transform 5M+ daily events into
MongoDB and PostgreSQL, and implemented Jenkins CI/CD with a React KPI dashboard for real-time monitoring and on-call triage.
